name: Formula Racer: Track Car Racing Game

reviews.review_description: I’ve been looking for a good F1 sim for a while. I opted for this one as the others available had poor reviews. This is NOT a good game. Graphics are pretty basic. Controls are unfathomable (and there is no tutorial or guide available that I can see). The other cars your racing change direction for not obvious reason. If you’re looking for a decent F1 game…keep looking.
